overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk metropolis featuring towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and elevated highways. The scene showcases futuristic vehicles, pedestrians with umbrellas, and wet streets reflecting neon lights, characteristic of high-end video game graphics.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beside a futuristic tram line, with massive elevated highways overhead and towering digital billboards illuminating the right side. The camera tilts up to admire the imposing concrete infrastructure before continuing forward.

segments.scene_description: Continuing toward a busy intersection with increasing pedestrian traffic. The elevated highway remains prominent on the left while a traffic light pole comes into view. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in various directions, and the urban density increases.

segments.scene_description: Navigating a busy crosswalk with dense pedestrian traffic holding umbrellas. Futuristic vehicles including a green sports car drive through the wet intersection. The parking garage entrance becomes visible on the left as the camera moves through the crossing.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk section adjacent to a multi-level parking garage. A massive holographic billboard advertising security services dominates the view ahead, growing larger as the camera approaches. The area is more enclosed with the overpass overhead, and traffic continues to flow on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that shifts from an open industrial corridor into a dense, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins along a sidewalk beside a futuristic tram line, where the camera tilts upward to take in the massive concrete highways and towering digital billboards overhead. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes increasingly crowded, transitioning toward a busy intersection filled with pedestrians holding umbrellas and a prominent traffic light pole. The scene then flows through a wet crosswalk as futuristic vehicles, including a green sports car, navigate the crossing beside a parking garage entrance. Finally, the path leads under a covered sidewalk section where the view is dominated by a massive holographic security advertisement that grows larger as the camera approaches the enclosed overpass.
